commands.review_summary:
The PR makes runtime `toolsAllow: ["*"]` skip static profile/provider-profile filters in `createOpenClawCodingTools` and adds a focused regression test for `exec` visibility with the `messaging` profile.

PR surface: Source +12, Tests +25. Total +37 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main passes runtime `toolsAllow` into tool construction and then applies wildcard filtering after profile filtering, so `applyEmbeddedAttemptToolsAllow` cannot restore an `exec` tool already removed by the `messaging` profile. I did not run tests because this review was read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs contributor real behavior proof plus maintainer acceptance of the tool-authorization boundary; the code repair is narrow, but the missing proof gate should stay human-handled.

target.title: fix(agents): allow runtime wildcard tool allowlist to override static…
target.body:
## Summary

When a cron job sets `toolsAllow: ["*"]`, the runtime wildcard should override the agent's static tool profile (e.g. `messaging`) so that `exec` and other coding tools remain available.

Previously, `createOpenClawCodingTools` applied the static profile policy via `applyToolPolicyPipeline` before considering the runtime allowlist. This caused `exec` to be filtered out for cron sessions using the `messaging` profile even when `toolsAllow: ["*"]` was explicitly set.

### Key Changes

- `src/agents/agent-tools.ts`: When `runtimeToolAllowlist` contains `*`, skip `profilePolicy` and `providerProfilePolicy` steps in the tool policy pipeline.
- `src/agents/agent-tools.runtime-allowlist-override.test.ts`: Add regression tests verifying wildcard override behavior.

### Issue Reference

Fixes #89228 (Bug B: exec unavailable in isolated sessions)

## Real Behavior Proof

**Behavior addressed**: `exec` tool is now available when cron isolated sessions use `toolsAllow: ["*"]` with a `messaging` profile agent.

**Real environment tested**: Linux, Node.js 22.22, branch `fix/cron-exec-wildcard-override-89228`, commit `74af4f7cb`.

**Exact steps or command run after this patch**:
```bash
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/agent-tools.runtime-allowlist-override.test.ts --run
```

**Evidence after fix**:
```
✓ |unit-fast| src/agents/agent-tools.runtime-allowlist-override.test.ts (2 tests)
     ✓ includes exec when runtimeToolAllowlist contains wildcard even with messaging profile
     ✓ excludes exec with messaging profile and no runtime wildcard
```

**Observed result after fix**: 
- `toolsAllow: ["*"]` + `messaging` profile → `exec` is present in tool list
- `messaging` profile without wildcard → `exec` correctly absent (narrow profile preserved)
- Existing tests unaffected (46 related tests pass)

**What was not tested**: Live cron scheduler execution with real agent payload, gateway-level integration with running cron service.
target.author: tanshanshan
